title: README slim-down: Auto + GSD
goal: Trim the ## Auto mode and ## Import from GSD sections to a short pointer each, linking to docs/{interactive,non-interactive}/auto.md and import-gsd.md, moving the duplicated behaviour (3-pass retry, report contract, GSD import details) into docs while keeping any positioning text that belongs in the README.

steps.title: Audit auto/import docs coverage gaps
steps.detail: auto.md is missing the one-session rationale, the report contract (YAML statuses + free text, the done({auto}) source), the 3-pass retry (prev.md link, fallback to interactive done on missing report), and the acceptEdits permission detail. import-gsd.md is complete; the README's GSD positioning is marketing, keep a trimmed version in README not in docs.

steps.title: Enrich auto.md docs
steps.detail: Add the one-Claude-session rationale, the report contract, the 3-pass retry mechanics, and the acceptEdits permission note to docs/non-interactive/auto.md so nothing is lost.

steps.title: Slim ## Auto mode to a pointer
steps.detail: Replace the section and its One Claude session subsection with a short blurb (auto loops next-plan-do-done unattended, always stops at human verify) plus a link to docs auto.md.

steps.title: Slim ## Import from GSD to a pointer
steps.detail: Keep one positioning sentence (mini as a lighter alternative to GSD) plus the mini import-gsd command, and link the mechanics to docs import-gsd.md.

steps.title: Fix cross-refs and verify
steps.detail: Confirm all docs links resolve, README is meaningfully shorter, and no dangling references remain.

resolvedVerify: Auto + GSD blurbs read well after the slim-down
